components.buttons: Flat, sharp corners (rounded-sm), heavy text weight, hover state must shift contrast (e.g. bg-primary to bg-black).
components.cards: Cardless or 1px sharp borders. No generic drop shadows. Use 'border border-gray-200 hover:border-gray-400 transition-colors' for a technical feel.
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults customized with rounded-sm, border-gray-300, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary.
components.badges: Square or very slightly rounded edges, bold background (e.g., bg-black text-white or bg-primary text-white), small uppercase text with wide tracking.

motion.hover_states: Crisp and immediate color transitions. Small translateY (-translate-y-1) for service cards.
motion.scroll_effects: Use mild staggered fade-up for bento grid children.

hero_image.alt: Delivery truck on a scenic route representing relocation

trust_section_image.alt: Happy family surrounded by moving boxes

section_specific_rules.top_bar: bg-secondary text-white py-2 text-sm. Include phone and email.
section_specific_rules.header: Solid background, 1px bottom border (border-gray-200), sticky positioning (z-50). Ensure a bold Get Quote CTA.
section_specific_rules.hero: Asymmetric Bento Grid (Mode A). Break the standard left-text right-image pattern. Combine typography with overlapping asset images and stat badges.
section_specific_rules.services: Grid of 6 items. Use exposed grid skeleton look (borders between items) or sharp cards. Icons must be Phosphor duotone.
section_specific_rules.why_choose_us: Massive typography for stats (e.g., text-6xl or text-7xl font-light) with small uppercase labels under them.
section_specific_rules.service_areas: Use Grid Borders surface strategy. Expose the skeleton. Dense listing of areas like a data table or technical grid.
section_specific_rules.quote_form: Integrate with Shadcn UI Form. Must have all fields (Name, Phone, Email, Moving From/To, Move Type, Date, Details). Save to MongoDB.
section_specific_rules.footer: Contrast shift: bg-black text-white. Massive 'Let\'s Move' text at the bottom. Ample py-24 padding.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
